title: Oden Sails with Roger Toward the World’s Truth
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Roger, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Roger Pirates, Unknown person #8 as Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
scene: Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Come on, men!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Look them!!!

dialogue.speaker: Roger
dialogue.text: The Roger Pirates vs the Whitebeard Pirates

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Battle between these two great pirate crews...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Lasted three days and three nights...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With the upperhand constantly shifting from side to side!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: 4 days later...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What an outrageous shirt! Where did you get it?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait a minute, you're drinking too much! We agreed everyone would have the same amount!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This southern sake is too good.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'll give you three crates for it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This has just become a gift exchange...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Are the boys over there apprentices?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yeah... they've been there for a while.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: They don't look very strong, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The second thing is that you

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Their attitude is quite impressive.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey shanks, do you see that guy with the hat?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yeah?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He didn't sleep during the truck we had for the last few days.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Huh? Why?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I heard he's never slept in his life.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huh?! How is that even possible? I'm jealous.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You would have twice as much time to enjoy your life if you didn't need to sleep!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's not that simple, idiot! He's a monster.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Can you read it?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Yes, I can.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: But why did you transcribe this?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These symbols are a secret code. The way to decode them was passed from generation to generation to the firstborn of the Kozuki clan from Wano.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We took this 13 years ago. We were able to do what no one else had done:

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: reach the end of the log pose. The island road star!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But when we finally got there, I realized... it wasn't the last island!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our log pose couldn't guide us further because the needles kept spinning!!! But...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'm sure there's one last island!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: An island you need to reach in order to travel the whole world. A feat never done before.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It has these inscriptions marked on four special red stones, I believe they're clues

dialogue.speaker: Roger Pirates
dialogue.text: to the final island. But...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The world government banned the deciphering of PoneGlyphs long ago!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I used to think they were ordinary objects, so I was surprised when I discovered that they were essential reference points for achieving our goal.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That means the world government doesn't want anyone to reach the final island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Their actions only confirm the legends that there's a huge treasure hidden there!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we can get there, surely we'll be the biggest pirate crew in the world!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The biggest...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That's right! And then I'll be...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What?

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden, Roger, and the Final Voyage storyline with 45 dialogue beats. Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
